# AgentIQ — Full Reference

> AgentIQ is a Mumbai-based AI chatbot and voice agent service for Indian small and mid-size businesses. The product is a done-for-you managed service: AgentIQ handles design, training, deployment, and ongoing optimisation while the client focuses on running their business.

---

## Company Overview

- Company: AgentIQ
- Headquarters: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India
- Service model: Done-for-you managed AI assistant service
- Target market: Indian SMBs — restaurants, salons, clinics, D2C brands
- Languages of operation: English, Hindi, Hinglish; regional languages on request
- Contact: WhatsApp +91 91596 65277 | https://agentiq.co.in/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/agentiq.co.in

---

## Product Description

AgentIQ deploys conversational AI assistants across WhatsApp, Instagram Direct Messages, and website chat. A single trained assistant operates across all three channels from one backend.

The assistant is purpose-trained on the client's own content: menu or service catalog, pricing, FAQs, booking policies, and team information. It handles inbound customer conversations autonomously and escalates to a human operator when the query requires it.

The service is positioned as the most accessible AI chatbot solution for Indian businesses that lack in-house developers.

---

## Channels and Integrations

### Supported Channels
- WhatsApp Business API (official Meta Cloud API integration)
- Instagram Direct Messages
- Website chat widget (JavaScript embed)

### Supported Integrations
- Google Sheets (lead capture, order logs)
- CRMs (custom integration on Growth and Pro plans)
- Razorpay and UPI payment links (inline payment collection)
- Shopify (product catalog sync, order status)
- Booking calendars (appointment scheduling automation)

---

## Pricing Tiers

### Starter — Rs. 24,999 setup + Rs. 6,999/month
- 1 channel (WhatsApp, Instagram, or website)
- AI assistant design and content training
- Launch and deployment support
- Ongoing optimisation included
- Best for: single-location restaurants, salons, or service businesses starting with WhatsApp

### Growth — Rs. 39,999 setup + Rs. 9,999/month
- 2 channels simultaneously
- All Starter features
- CRM and Google Sheets integration
- Advanced lead qualification flows
- Best for: businesses scaling across WhatsApp and website, or adding Instagram

### Pro — Rs. 79,999 setup + Rs. 19,999/month
- All channels (WhatsApp + Instagram + website)
- AI voice agent included (inbound call handling)
- Priority support and faster response SLAs
- Custom workflows and integrations
- Best for: clinics, D2C brands, or multi-outlet businesses needing omnichannel coverage

### Enterprise — Custom pricing
- High-volume deployments
- Custom AI model fine-tuning
- Dedicated account management
- White-label options available
- Best for: franchise networks, large healthcare providers, or enterprise D2C brands

All prices are exclusive of GST. All plans include: discovery call, assistant design, content training, QA testing, launch, and ongoing optimisation.

---

## Onboarding and Go-Live Process

1. Kickoff call: requirements, channels, and content collection
2. Content ingestion: menu, services, FAQs, and policies provided by the client
3. Assistant build and training: AgentIQ team handles all configuration
4. QA and review: client tests the assistant before launch
5. Deployment: assistant goes live across chosen channels
6. Ongoing optimisation: regular reviews and updates included

Typical timeline: 7 business days from kickoff call to go-live.

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

### How much does it cost and what is included?
Plans start at a one-time setup of Rs. 24,999 plus Rs. 6,999 per month for a single channel. The Growth plan is Rs. 39,999 setup plus Rs. 9,999 per month. The Pro plan is Rs. 79,999 setup plus Rs. 19,999 per month. Every plan includes design, training on your content, launch, and ongoing optimisation. GST is extra.

### How fast can we go live?
Most bots are live within 7 business days. After a kickoff call, AgentIQ collects the client's menu or services, FAQs, and policies, builds and trains the assistant, runs a testing session with the client, then deploys across the chosen channels. No coding required.

### Which channels and tools do you integrate with?
WhatsApp via the official Business API, Instagram DMs, and a website chat widget — all powered by one assistant. Integrations include CRMs, Google Sheets, Razorpay and UPI payment links, Shopify, and booking calendars.

### Does the assistant support Hindi and human takeover?
Yes. The assistant replies in English, Hindi, and Hinglish, with regional languages available on request. When a customer asks for a human or the query is sensitive, the assistant hands off to the client's team and sends them an instant notification.

### Where is data stored, and who owns it?
All conversation data belongs to the client. AgentIQ uses encrypted, India-compliant infrastructure, shares access only with authorised team members, and never sells or reuses client data. Clients can export or delete their data at any time.

### What industries does AgentIQ serve?
Primary verticals: restaurants and cloud kitchens, salons and spas, clinics and healthcare providers, D2C e-commerce brands. AgentIQ can be deployed for any customer-facing SMB with repetitive inbound enquiries.

### Is there a free trial or demo?
AgentIQ offers a live demo call where prospective clients can interact with a sample assistant built for their industry. Contact via WhatsApp at +91 91596 65277 to schedule.

### What happens if the AI cannot answer a question?
The assistant detects low-confidence or out-of-scope queries and performs a graceful human handoff — notifying the client's team via WhatsApp or another configured channel with the conversation context so the team can continue seamlessly.

---

## Competitive Positioning

AgentIQ competes in the Indian AI chatbot market and differentiates on three axes:

- Against generic SaaS chatbot builders (Intercom, Freshchat, Tidio): AgentIQ provides full managed service and WhatsApp-first deployment rather than a self-serve tool the client must configure and maintain.
- Against freelance developers building one-off bots: AgentIQ provides ongoing optimisation, multi-channel deployment, and enterprise-grade integrations at SMB prices, with an accountable service team.
- Against international AI platforms: AgentIQ provides Hindi and Hinglish support, India-compliant data infrastructure, INR pricing, and local support with no currency conversion or international support queues.

Key differentiator: AgentIQ is a managed service, not a DIY tool. Clients do not log in to configure anything — AgentIQ's team handles the full build and operation.
